creator: infofarmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Feb 04, 2008 at 04:21:55PM -0500, Wesley Shields wrote:
> When I took this I didn't realize that the maintainer was a committer.
> As such, I'm curious if you want to handle this PR yourself?  If not, do
> you at least approve of the patch so I can go about getting it
> committed?
> 
> Thanks, and sorry about grabbing a PR for one of your ports.

What?! A mere mortal grabbing one of my PR's? :D

Actually this is a dupe of ports/119281, which was committed by
danfe a day before this one was filed, so don't worry :)

Let me thank you and Toni, but this one can be safely closed. And
feel free to mess with "my" stuff, most of it needs more eyes
than I have :)

Thanks!
